nasb.text: so that no advantage would be taken of us by Satan, for we are not ignorant of his schemes.

esv.text: so that we would not be outwitted by Satan; for we are not ignorant of his designs.

cnv.text: 免得撒但有機可乘，因為我們並不是不曉得他的詭計。

ccb.text: 免得撒旦乘虚而入，因为我们并非不知道它的诡计。

csbs.text: 免得被撒旦占了上风，因为我们不是不明白它的意图。
